howItWorks.intro: This tip & bill split calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Tax laws and financial markets change frequently. Verify current rates with your financial institution.

faq.a: 15% for adequate, 18-20% for good, 20%+ for excellent service.
Either is acceptable. Most people tip on the full bill including tax.
